violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishments RICFSM has expired. Establishment is to renew/re-apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Per PIC, food safety class will be completed on Monday. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Chicken patty sandwiches were observed held between 123 and 125 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved chicken patty sandwiches to hot box. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and freezer units (bottom shelves) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. PIC cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Inspector observed the weather stripping to be bent. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC contacted main kitchen to deliver more during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean inareas of the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen carts have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the back kitchen area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
